---
title: "Selected Work"
---

This page highlights public-facing work and representative analytics products. Confidential client code, non-public dashboards, internal models, and proprietary data are not posted here.

## Recent public work, 2022--2026

<div class="card">

### Florida Center for Nursing — State of Nursing Education in Florida, 2026

**Role:** Data integration, analysis, reporting, and public-facing workforce education outputs.  
**What it demonstrates:** reproducible reporting, state workforce analytics, nursing education pipeline analysis, stakeholder-facing deliverables.  
**Link:** [State of Nursing Education in Florida, 2026](https://flcenterfornursing.org/research-data/nursing-education-reports/the-state-of-nursing-education-in-florida-2026-report/)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Florida Healthcare Workforce Projections, 2022--2037

**Role:** Workforce projection analysis and public decision-support outputs for state healthcare planning.  
**What it demonstrates:** supply/demand modeling, public-sector analytics, client-facing reporting, workforce planning.  
**Link:** [Florida Healthcare Workforce Projections, 2022--2037](https://flcenterfornursing.org/research-data/nursing-workforce-reports/florida-health-care-workforce-projections-2022-2037/)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Hawaii Nursing Workforce Projections

**Role:** Supported statewide nursing workforce projection analysis and stakeholder-facing deliverables.  
**What it demonstrates:** projection modeling, executive communication, public report production, state workforce strategy.  
**Links:** [Report](https://www.hawaiicenterfornursing.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Hawaii-Nursing-Projections-Report-v.Final-1.pdf) | [Launch deck](https://www.hawaiicenterfornursing.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Projections-Launch-Final-Deck.pdf)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Maryland Nurse Workforce Projections

**Role:** Contributed to workforce projection analysis and public-facing deliverables.  
**What it demonstrates:** client reporting, nurse workforce analytics, projection methods.  
**Link:** [Maryland Nurse Workforce Projections](https://mhaonline.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Maryland-Nurse-Workforce-Projections-GlobalData.pdf)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Tennessee and Arkansas Health Workforce Reports

**Role:** Supported state-level health workforce reporting and projection deliverables.  
**What it demonstrates:** multi-client analytics delivery, workforce planning, report production.  
**Links:** [Tennessee Health Workforce Projections](https://tha.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/Tennessee-Health-Workforce-Projections-report-FINAL.pdf) | [Arkansas Workforce Report](https://issuu.com/arkhospitals/docs/arkansasworkforcereport-january2023)

</div>

## Public R/Shiny and R Markdown examples

<div class="card">

### National Nursing by the Numbers Dashboard

**Role:** Designed and built a public R Shiny/flexdashboard companion to the 2020 National Nursing Workforce Survey analysis.  
**What it demonstrates:** public-facing dashboard design, R/Shiny development, survey data summarization, data product communication.  
**Link:** [Dashboard](https://clarkruttinger.shinyapps.io/draftboard/)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Utah Mental Health Workforce, 2021

**Role:** Designed and administered statewide licensed behavioral health workforce surveys; contributed analysis, charting, and projection model components.  
**What it demonstrates:** survey design, workforce supply analysis, projection modeling, public report development.  
**Link:** [Interactive project](http://umec-shiny-prod-alb-79075571.us-west-2.elb.amazonaws.com/projects/Mental_Health/)

</div>

<div class="card">

### Physician Ratios Dashboard

**Role:** Built a comparison dashboard for Utah physician specialty ratios relative to national benchmarks.  
**What it demonstrates:** dashboarding, health workforce benchmarking, public-sector analytics.  
**Link:** [Dashboard](http://umec-shiny-prod-alb-79075571.us-west-2.elb.amazonaws.com/projects/FlexRatios/#section-about)

</div>

<div class="card">

### RN Wage Analysis in R

**Role:** Built an R Markdown analysis of Utah RN wage data from workforce surveys.  
**What it demonstrates:** reproducible analysis, public communication, survey analytics.  
**Links:** [R Markdown analysis](https://rpubs.com/crutting/DesNewsAnalysis) | [Related Deseret News article](https://www.deseret.com/indepth/2021/2/28/22208271/covid-19-revealed-about-nursing-health-care-pandemic-wages-utah-intermountain-health-care)

</div>

<p class="small-note">Older public examples are retained because they show long-running experience in R-based public analytics. Newer proprietary GlobalData dashboards and code are not posted.</p>
